commands.fix-validate: npx biome check --write && npx dprint fmt "**/*.md" && npx markdownlint-cli2 --fix "**/*.md" && npx markdownlint-cli2 "**/*.md"
commands.pre-push-validate: npx biome check && npx dprint check "**/*.md" && npx markdownlint-cli2 "**/*.md" && npx cspell lint "**" --no-progress
commands.post-fix-validate: npx biome check --write && npx dprint fmt "**/*.md" && npx markdownlint-cli2 --fix "**/*.md" && npx markdownlint-cli2 "**/*.md" && npx cspell lint "**" --no-progress
